REPLY TO OPPOS OF WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER HERRERA, LUCIANO

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER LUCIANO HERRERA'S WRIT OF MANDATE, ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE ISSUED. RESPONDENT SHALL FILE AND SERVE ITS OPPOSITION STATING WHATEVER CAUSE THERE MAY BE NOT TO GRANT THE RELIEF REQUESTED IN THE PETITION NO LATER THAN AUGUST 4, 2009. PETITIONER MAY FILE AND SERVE ANY REPLY NO LATER THAN AUGUST 10, 2009. HEARING WILL BE HELD IN DEPARTMENT 301 ON AUGUST 17, 2009 AT 9:30 A.M, ABSENT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780

Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Phong Wang of the Office of the Public Defender (553.9335) for petitioner and moving party
Gregg Zywicke of the Office of the Attorney General (703.5961) for respondent and opposing party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: PETITIONER LUCIANO HERRERA'S PETITIONER FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is granted. There is no evidentiary basis for the requirement of registration. Moving party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Ntc Of Hearing Petitioners' Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-24-2009 Continued To Aug-17-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER LUCIANO HERRERA'S Writ Of Mandate, ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE ISSUED. RESPONDENT SHALL FILE AND SERVE ITS OPPOSITION STATING WHATEVER CAUSE THERE MAY BE NOT TO GRANT THE RELIEF REQUESTED IN THE PETITION NO LATER THAN AUGUST 4, 2009. PETITIONER MAY FILE AND SERVE ANY REPLY NO LATER THAN AUGUST 10, 2009. HEARING WILL BE HELD IN DEPARTMENT 3 0 1 ON AUGUST 17, 2009 AT 9:30 A.M, ABSENT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. Judge: Peter J.
